name: Data Destruction in SharePoint
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event matches Affected Workload (custom) is any of SharePoint
when the event matches Operation (custom) is any of [Delete Site or SiteDeleted or Update Site or Delete Site Collection]
TD_list: APPLY Data Destruction in SharePoint on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event matches Affected Workload (custom) is any of SharePoint
AND when the event matches Operation (custom) is any of [Delete Site or SiteDeleted or Update Site or Delete Site Collection]
RED_list: Event name: Data Destruction in SharePoint
Event description: Detects critical changes or deletion of SharePoint sites, indicating potential insider threat or ransomware activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
